addons.description: Have your catch professionally cleaned and filleted at the end of the trip so it's ready for the grill or freezer.
High-resolution photos and short video clips of your trip, delivered via online gallery.
Upgrade to premium live bait for better chances on trophy fish.
Assorted bottled water and soft drinks on ice for your group.
Sandwich, chips, and a drink for each angler, packed in a cooler.

boats.name: Bay Runner
boats.description: Shallow-draft bay boat ideal for inshore flats, mangroves, and bay fishing around Miami.

boats.name: Pelagic Hunter
boats.description: Fast offshore center console equipped for reef, wreck, and pelagic trips off Miami.

boats.name: Pacific Voyager
boats.description: Pilot house boat with enclosed cabin, ideal for full-day offshore tuna runs out of San Diego.

boats.name: Yellowtail Express
boats.description: Stable sportfisher with large deck and cabin, set up for multi-species offshore trips.

boats.name: Emerald Coast Explorer
boats.description: Family-friendly hybrid bay/offshore boat with plenty of seating and shade for kids.

boats.name: Reef Runner
boats.description: Offshore express with cabin, fighting chair, and outriggers for bluewater Key West trips.

boats.name: Hudson Angler
boats.description: Large inspected party boat offering shared evening trips around New York Harbor.

boats.name: Lowcountry Skiff
boats.description: Technical skiff optimized for sight-fishing redfish in the Charleston marshes.

boats.name: Tampa Bay Flats
boats.description: Fast, stable bay boat perfect for inshore and nearshore Tampa Bay trips.

boats.name: Gulf Breeze
boats.description: Comfortable center console for weekend offshore charters out of Gulf Shores.

boats.name: Coastal Cat
boats.description: Smooth-riding power catamaran ideal for families and small groups.

boats.name: Offshore Adventurer
boats.description: Versatile 28 ft offshore boat used by several captains in different ports.

promo_codes.description: 10% off when you book eligible Saturday and Sunday trips totaling over $1,000.
Save $15 on any weekday fall charter.
5% off flexible-date bookings on inshore trips.

bookings.charter_name: San Diego Offshore Tuna Full Day
NYC Evening Harbor Shared Trip (4 hrs)

charter_reviews.title: Great evening on the water
charter_reviews.body: Beautiful views of the skyline and plenty of action on light tackle. Crew was friendly and helpful.

charter_reviews.title: Fun trip, a bit crowded
charter_reviews.body: Overall a good time and we caught fish, but the boat was fairly full. Still worth it for the price.

charter_reviews.title: Good value shared charter
charter_reviews.body: Exactly as advertised. Shared boat, basic gear, and a relaxed evening around the harbor.

charter_reviews.title: Perfect way to see NYC at night
charter_reviews.body: Loved combining sightseeing with fishing. Captain shared lots of local history too.

charter_reviews.title: Slow bite but nice crew
charter_reviews.body: Fishing was a little slow the night we went, but the crew worked hard to move and try different spots.

charter_reviews.title: Great for beginners
charter_reviews.body: Took my teenage kids and they had a blast. Crew helped with everything from baiting to unhooking fish.

charter_reviews.title: Nice evening trip
charter_reviews.body: Boat was clean, gear was in good shape, and we caught a few keeper fish.

charter_reviews.title: Well-run operation
charter_reviews.body: Check-in was easy, captain explained everything clearly, and safety was a priority.

charter_reviews.title: Exceeded expectations
charter_reviews.body: Caught more fish than we expected on a shared trip and the night views were incredible.

charter_reviews.title: Would go again
charter_reviews.body: Good mix of locals and tourists on board. I’d definitely book this again with friends.

charter_reviews.title: Epic tuna day
charter_reviews.body: We limited out on tuna by noon and spent the afternoon chasing bigger models. Top-notch captain and crew.

charter_reviews.title: Professional and dialed-in
charter_reviews.body: Boat was comfortable, electronics were modern, and the captain really knew where to find fish.

charter_reviews.title: Great inshore action
charter_reviews.body: Snook and snapper bites were steady all morning. Perfect half-day trip in Miami.

charter_reviews.title: Family-friendly and fun
charter_reviews.body: Captain was great with our kids and kept us on fish the whole time.

charter_reviews.title: Solid offshore trip
charter_reviews.body: We hit reefs and then trolled offshore. Nice variety of fish and plenty of action.

charter_reviews.title: Lots of included extras
charter_reviews.body: Bait, licenses, and drinks were all included which made planning easy.

charter_reviews.title: Sight-fishing redfish heaven
charter_reviews.body: Poling the flats and sight-casting to tailing reds was a bucket-list experience.

charter_reviews.title: Perfect for young kids
charter_reviews.body: Captain was patient with our 6- and 8-year-olds. Short run, calm water, and constant bites.

charter_reviews.title: Very family oriented
charter_reviews.body: Plenty of shade, snacks, and easy fishing close to shore. Highly recommend for families.

captains.name: Capt. Luis Ramirez
captains.bio: Miami native specializing in light-tackle inshore and bay trips for snook, snapper, and tarpon. Known for patient instruction and easy-going coaching for beginners and families.

captains.name: Capt. Emily Chen
captains.bio: USCG-licensed captain running full-day offshore tuna and pelagic trips out of San Diego. Combines tournament-level tactics with a focus on safety and comfort.

captains.name: Capt. Robert Hayes
captains.bio: Veteran New York Harbor captain offering shared evening trips that blend sightseeing with relaxed bottom fishing. Great storyteller with deep local knowledge of the waterfront.

captains.name: Capt. Miguel Alvarez
captains.bio: Key West offshore specialist targeting sailfish, mahi, tuna, and reef species on 8-hour bluewater adventures. Focused on full-service trips with lots of included amenities.

captains.name: Capt. Tyler Greene
captains.bio: Charleston marsh and flats guide specializing in sight-fishing for redfish with artificial and fly tackle. Runs a skinny-water skiff and loves teaching technical casting.

captains.name: Capt. Sarah Collins
captains.bio: Family-oriented captain in Destin offering calm-water morning trips tailored for kids and first-time anglers. Emphasizes fun, safety, and lots of bent rods close to shore.

captains.name: Capt. Jason Miller
captains.bio: Tampa Bay inshore guide targeting redfish, trout, and snook on 6-hour trips for small groups. Known for flexible start times and a focus on keeping your catch when regulations allow.

captains.name: Capt. Anthony Brooks
captains.bio: Gulf Shores offshore captain running premium weekend trips for snapper, amberjack, and king mackerel. Caters to small groups looking for higher-end, customizable charters.

captains.name: Capt. Daniel Foster
captains.bio: Runs a smooth-riding power catamaran out of Gulf Shores, ideal for families and small groups. Offers a mix of nearshore reef trips and relaxed sightseeing-fishing combos.

captains.name: Capt. Kevin O'Neil
captains.bio: Traveling offshore captain who crews on multiple 28–32 ft boats across Florida and the Gulf. Experienced in both trolling and bottom-fishing setups for mixed groups.

captains.name: Capt. Maria Lopez
captains.bio: NYC-based captain offering alternative shared and private trips focused on light-tackle striped bass and bottom fishing around the harbor and lower Hudson.

captains.name: Capt. Hiro Tanaka
captains.bio: San Diego offshore specialist and former long-range deckhand now running his own 30 ft pilothouse boat for tuna, yellowtail, and dorado trips.

charters.name: Miami Bay Inshore Half-Day
charters.description: Light-tackle inshore trip in Biscayne Bay targeting snook, snapper, and the occasional tarpon. Bait and tackle are included, and the 24 ft bay boat is ideal for up to 4 anglers.

charters.name: Miami Budget Inshore Morning Trip
charters.description: A value-focused 4-hour inshore trip staying close to the marina for steady action on snapper and jacks. Great option if you want a shorter, affordable morning on the bay.

charters.name: San Diego Offshore Tuna Full Day
charters.description: Run 30–60 miles offshore aboard a comfortable pilothouse boat targeting bluefin, yellowfin, and yellowtail. Includes bait, tackle, and all required licenses.

charters.name: San Diego Long-Range Tuna Hunt
charters.description: Premium 10-hour offshore charter on a 34 ft sportfisher with cabin and galley. Troll and drift for trophy bluefin and seasonal pelagics.

charters.name: NYC Evening Harbor Shared Trip (4 hrs)
charters.description: Shared evening trip aboard a 60 ft party boat combining relaxed bottom fishing with incredible views of the NYC skyline and Statue of Liberty.

charters.name: NYC Afternoon Striper & Sights
charters.description: Smaller-group shared charter focused on light-tackle striped bass and bottom fishing with great photo ops of lower Manhattan and Brooklyn Bridge.

charters.name: Key West 8-Hour Offshore Adventure
charters.description: Run offshore from Key West for a full 8-hour adventure targeting mahi, tuna, wahoo, and more on a comfortable express boat with cabin and restroom.

charters.name: Key West Offshore Standard 8-Hour
charters.description: Classic Key West offshore charter focusing on reef and light bluewater species. A bit more basic but a solid option under most budgets.

charters.name: Charleston Tailing Redfish Flats Trip
charters.description: Poling the shallow marsh flats in a technical skiff, sight-casting to tailing redfish on light spin or fly tackle. Best for anglers looking for a technical experience.

charters.name: Charleston Morning Redfish & Trout
charters.description: Flexible morning inshore charter around the Charleston marshes targeting redfish and speckled trout with live bait under popping corks.

charters.name: Charleston Budget Redfish Half-Day
charters.description: A straightforward half-day redfish trip staying closer to the ramp, perfect if you want a taste of Lowcountry fishing at a lower price point.

charters.name: Destin Family-Friendly Bay Trip (4 hrs)
charters.description: Calm-water morning charter tailored for families with young kids. Short run times, plenty of action on smaller fish, and lots of shade on board.

charters.name: Destin Kids First Cast Adventure
charters.description: Ultra-relaxed family charter focused on teaching kids how to cast, reel, and handle their first fish. Short runs and simple techniques.

charters.name: Destin Family Nearshore 6-Hour
charters.description: Step up to a 6-hour nearshore family trip to chase bigger fish on close-to-shore reefs while still keeping things comfortable for kids and beginners.

charters.name: Tampa Bay Inshore 6-Hour
charters.description: Six-hour inshore charter around Tampa Bay targeting redfish, trout, and snook with live and artificial baits. Great balance of fishing time and comfort.

charters.name: Tampa Bay Flats 6-Hour Catch & Release
charters.description: Focus on catch-and-release fishing for trophy redfish and snook on the flats. Ideal for anglers who want photos and memories without keeping fish.

charters.name: Gulf Shores Saturday Offshore 6-Hour (Shared)
charters.description: Weekend shared charter out of Gulf Shores targeting red snapper and amberjack on nearshore reefs. Limited spots on a 30 ft offshore center console.

charters.name: Gulf Shores Sunday Offshore 6-Hour (Shared)
charters.description: Sunday shared trip hitting a different set of reefs for snapper and triggers. Smooth-riding catamaran ideal for small groups.
